doc_meta.purpose: Freeze transport contract authoring entrypoint for BFF and Server.

info.title: Exhibition Infrastructure API
info.description: Phase 2A OpenAPI skeleton for Flutter App canonical paths, plus retained Admin and internal service alignment placeholders.

get.summary: Generic liveness probe skeleton

200.description: OK

get.summary: Generic readiness probe skeleton

200.description: Ready

get.summary: Shell context canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: The first formal app-facing shell context surface for Flutter App. This path freezes only the current shell projection fields and replaces the old non-canonical shell path; it must not remain as a second parallel user-facing semantic surface.

get.summary: Profile index canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum read-only profile aggregation for Flutter App. This path freezes only `organization`, `certification`, `membership`, and `settingsEntry`; it must not expand into account write-back, organization management, certification application, membership purchase, or a full settings subsystem.

post.summary: OTP send canonical path for Flutter App login

200.description: Minimum OTP send acknowledgment for Flutter App.

post.summary: OTP login canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum session establish response for Flutter App.

post.summary: Session refresh canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Rotated app-facing access and refresh token projection.

post.summary: Logout canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum logout acknowledgment for Flutter App.

post.summary: Organization create canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum organization create response for Flutter App.

post.summary: Organization join-by-code canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum organization join-by-code response for Flutter App.

post.summary: Organization switch canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Switched shell context projection for Flutter App.

get.summary: My organizations canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum list of organizations available to the current actor.

get.summary: Organization members canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum list of current organization members for Flutter App.

patch.summary: Organization member role patch canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum organization member role patch acknowledgment.

patch.summary: Organization member disable canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum organization member disable acknowledgment.

post.summary: Certification submit canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum certification submit response for Flutter App.

get.summary: Current certification canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum current certification projection for Flutter App.

post.summary: Certification resubmit canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum certification resubmit response for Flutter App.

get.summary: Security devices canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum current user device list for Flutter App.

post.summary: Security device revoke canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum device revoke acknowledgment for Flutter App.

get.summary: Profile governance-status canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum governance summary for the current actor and organization scope only. This path does not reopen a full governance center, penalty history, or appeal history.

404.description: Controlled unavailable response. If the current governance summary is hidden or not materialized for the current actor scope, the server or BFF must return `GOVERNANCE_STATUS_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Profile governance appeal-submit canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum governance appeal-submit acknowledgment only. This path does not reopen appeal list, appeal detail, or user-side adjudication surfaces.

400.description: Controlled invalid appeal-submit response. If the request body is malformed or missing the minimum required fields, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_APPEAL_SUBMIT_INVALID`.

404.description: Controlled unavailable response. If the targeted penalty truth is not available to the current actor scope, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_PENALTY_RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`.

get.summary: Instance todo index canonical path for Flutter App messages building

200.description: The current app-facing canonical path for `instance_todo` list/items consumption in the `messages` building. This path carries only the frozen `instance_todo` item skeleton and the frozen unified registered-entry `routeTarget` projection. This path is a controlled projection carrier only; it is not a full `RegisteredInstanceEntryItem` exposure surface, not a general-purpose message center, not a station inbox, not a workbench, not a governance console, and not a new path expansion surface.

get.summary: Exhibition ordered-home aggregation canonical path for Flutter App

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Current request device latitude hint only. This hint does not create persisted location truth.

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Current request device longitude hint only. This hint does not create persisted location truth.

parameters.name: provinceCode
parameters.description: Current request effective province hint only. `BFF` may still prefer the current manual selection when one exists in the current session.

parameters.name: provinceName
parameters.description: Current request effective province display hint only.

parameters.name: locationPermissionState
parameters.description: Client-reported device location permission state for current home aggregation only.

200.description: Ordered exhibition home aggregation for Flutter App. This path freezes one normalized first-screen read model only, including the current location and weather card, six module containers, and ordered recommendation sections. The current weather card may include the V1 construction warning semantic layer, but it must not become weather truth, location truth, a second recommendation state machine, or a second private dashboard.

400.description: Controlled effective-location unavailable response. When neither current request hints, current session selection, nor allowed fallback context can resolve a usable location, `BFF` must return `LOCATION_REQUIRED` or `LOCATION_PERMISSION_UNAVAILABLE`.

503.description: Controlled home aggregation unavailable response. `BFF` must normalize upstream weather or aggregation failures into `HOME_WEATHER_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` or `HOME_AGGREGATION_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Refresh ordered exhibition home aggregation via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Optional current request location context only. Refresh must rebuild the full current home aggregation, not only the weather block.

200.description: Refreshed exhibition ordered-home aggregation. This success body is the same normalized full-home read model returned by `GET /api/app/exhibition/home`, including the current V1 construction warning semantic layer when available.

400.description: Controlled effective-location unavailable response. `BFF` must return `LOCATION_REQUIRED` or `LOCATION_PERMISSION_UNAVAILABLE` when refresh cannot determine the effective location.

504.description: Controlled full-home refresh timeout response. `BFF` must return `HOME_REFRESH_TIMEOUT` when the current full-home aggregation exceeds the timeout boundary.

503.description: Controlled home aggregation unavailable response. `BFF` must normalize upstream weather or aggregation failures into `HOME_WEATHER_UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE` or `HOME_AGGREGATION_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Select current exhibition home location via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Manual current-location selection request for the ordered exhibition home only. In the current round this handoff may stay `BFF`-controlled and non-persistent.

200.description: Location selection accepted for the current ordered home aggregation. When the current round does not persist location to `Server`, the returned read model must explicitly mark `selectionScope` and `selectionNotice` instead of pretending the choice was stored permanently. The returned read model may also refresh the current V1 construction warning semantic layer.

400.description: Controlled location selection invalid response. When the current manual selection body cannot produce a usable effective province, `BFF` must return `LOCATION_REQUIRED`.

get.summary: Exhibition private workbench summary canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: The only current app-facing exhibition private workbench summary path. This path freezes only the controlled summary projection for `project_chain`, `order_chain`, `fulfillment_chain`, and `extension_boundary`. It is a `BFF` summary carrier only; it must not become project, order, contract, milestone, inspection, rating, or dispute truth, must not introduce a second workflow state machine, and must not expose `rating/submit`, `inspection/recheck`, or `dispute/withdraw` as workbench executable actions.

get.summary: Enterprise hub board list canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub board list projection for Flutter App. This path freezes one list read model only and must not become organization identity truth, certification truth, or a second ranking state machine.

400.description: Controlled invalid board or query response. `BFF` must return `ENTERPRISE_HUB_INVALID_BOARD_TYPE` when boardType is missing or unsupported.

get.summary: Enterprise hub detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub detail read model for Flutter App. This path freezes one details projection only and must not become organization, certification, or recommendation truth.

404.description: Controlled enterprise-unavailable response. `Server` must return `ENTERPRISE_HUB_ENTERPRISE_NOT_FOUND` when the requested listing is absent or hidden under the current boundary.

get.summary: Enterprise hub recommendation slots canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub recommendation slot projection for the selected board only.

post.summary: Create enterprise hub application canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Created current enterprise hub application draft under current organization scope.

400.description: Controlled application-create invalid response. `Server` must return `ENTERPRISE_HUB_MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS` when the minimum create boundary is not met.

put.summary: Update enterprise hub basic listing profile canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub basic listing profile updated.

put.summary: Update enterprise hub company profile canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub company profile updated.

put.summary: Update enterprise hub factory profile canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub factory profile updated.

put.summary: Update enterprise hub supplier profile canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub supplier profile updated.

post.summary: Create enterprise hub case canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub case created in draft or pending-review state.

post.summary: Submit enterprise hub application canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Enterprise hub application submitted into current review flow.

400.description: Controlled submit invalid response. `Server` must return one of `ENTERPRISE_HUB_PROFILE_NOT_COMPLETED`, `ENTERPRISE_HUB_CERTIFICATION_REQUIRED`, `ENTERPRISE_HUB_CONTACT_REQUIRED`, or `ENTERPRISE_HUB_CASE_REQUIRED` when the current submit boundary is not met.

get.summary: Enterprise hub application status canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Current enterprise hub application status projection.

404.description: Controlled application-unavailable response. `Server` must return `ENTERPRISE_HUB_APPLICATION_NOT_FOUND` when the current application is absent or out of actor scope.

get.summary: Forum feed canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum feed aggregation surface for Flutter App. This path carries ordered post-feed items for the current `square / local / following` browse chain, plus the frozen cursor page carrier and internal topic-label/filter semantics. It must not become forum truth, moderation truth, ranking configuration, or a second discovery state machine.

get.summary: Forum topic metadata canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum topic metadata projection for classify, select, and filter only. This path must not re-elevate topic into a first-level forum home entry.

get.summary: Forum topic list canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum topic list aggregation for Flutter App. This path keeps the same frozen topic-card semantics as `forum/feed` and adds only category filtering plus cursor pagination.

get.summary: Forum topic detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum topic detail read surface for Flutter App. This path freezes only topic summary, author summary, engagement summary, and the lead-post reference; it must not become moderation truth, reply timeline truth, or a second topic console.

404.description: Controlled topic-unavailable response. When topic truth is absent or hidden by the current visibility boundary, the server must return `FORUM_TOPIC_UNAVAILABLE`.

get.summary: Forum post detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum post detail read surface for Flutter App. This path freezes only the published post carrier, confirmed attachment references, and minimum author/topic anchors.

404.description: Controlled post-unavailable response. When post truth is absent or hidden by the current visibility boundary, the server must return `FORUM_POST_UNAVAILABLE`.

get.summary: Forum post comments canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum post-comment chain read projection for Flutter App. This path carries the visible comment list only and must not become moderation truth or a second discussion state machine.

404.description: Controlled post-comment unavailable response. When the current post is absent or hidden by visibility, the server must return `FORUM_POST_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Create forum post comment via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum forum comment-create request only. This path creates visible reply truth against an existing post or parent comment and must not become a second comment draft lifecycle.

202.description: Forum comment command accepted as a minimum handoff only.

400.description: Controlled comment request error. If required fields are missing or violate the current boundary, the server must return `FORUM_COMMENT_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If the current post or parent comment does not allow reply creation, the server must return `FORUM_COMMENT_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Toggle post like via canonical path for Flutter App

202.description: Minimum post-like toggle accepted response.

post.summary: Toggle post bookmark via canonical path for Flutter App

202.description: Minimum post-bookmark toggle accepted response.

post.summary: Toggle topic follow via canonical path for Flutter App

202.description: Minimum topic-follow toggle accepted response.

post.summary: Publish existing forum draft via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum forum publish handoff for Flutter App. This path forwards only an existing Server-owned `draftId`; it must not create a second draft lifecycle, edit truth, or attachment upload path family.

202.description: Forum publish command accepted as a minimum handoff only. The server returns the minimum published topic/post anchors and summary needed by Flutter App continuation.

400.description: Controlled forum publish request error. If `draftId` is missing or the request body violates the minimum publish boundary, the server must return `FORUM_PUBLISH_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled forum publish unavailable response. If the current draft state or upstream topic state does not allow publish, the server must return `FORUM_PUBLISH_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Save forum post draft via canonical path for Flutter App

202.description: Minimum forum draft-save accepted response.

400.description: Controlled draft-save request error. Invalid current draft input must return `FORUM_DRAFT_INVALID`.

get.summary: Forum draft list canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum draft list aggregation for Flutter App. This path shapes only the actor-visible draft cards and frozen cursor page carrier; it must not expose edit history, autosave timeline, or moderation internals.

post.summary: Delete forum draft via canonical path for Flutter App

202.description: Minimum forum draft-delete accepted response.

get.summary: Forum search canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum search aggregation for Flutter App. This path shapes only result cards plus the frozen cursor page carrier and must not become search-index truth, moderation filter truth, or operator investigation tooling.

400.description: Controlled search request error. If `q` is missing or violates the current minimum search boundary, the server must return `FORUM_SEARCH_INVALID`.

get.summary: Forum me-subtree summary canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum me-subtree aggregation for Flutter App. This path freezes only actor summary counts plus recent topic, post, and draft cards. It is a read-only aggregation carrier only, not a profile owner or a second personal-center truth surface.

get.summary: My forum posts canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum my-posts projection for the profile forum assets surface.

get.summary: My forum comments canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum my-comments projection for the profile forum assets surface.

get.summary: My forum bookmarks canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum my-bookmarks projection for the profile forum assets surface.

get.summary: My forum follows canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum my-follows projection for the profile forum assets surface.

get.summary: Forum-originated interaction inbox canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum forum-originated interaction inbox projection for the `messages` building only. This path must not become a second forum browse tree.

get.summary: Exhibition project list canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum project list read surface for Flutter App. Each item uses the same frozen `ProjectReadModel` as `GET /api/app/project/detail`; this path adds only the `items` carrier and must not become a second list-only project field model.

post.summary: Exhibition project create canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum project create command request for current Flutter App consumption. This request freezes only the current page-submitted fields.

202.description: Minimum project create command success body for Flutter App. The current frontend success chain freezes only `projectId`; this response must not expand into a full `ProjectReadModel`, bid handoff, order handoff, or any second command-success field model.

get.summary: Exhibition project detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum project detail read surface for Flutter App. This path freezes the same shared `ProjectReadModel` consumed by `GET /api/app/project/list`; it must not reopen bid compare, order conversion, collaboration, or a second detail-only project field model.

post.summary: Exhibition bid submit canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum bid submit command request for current Flutter App consumption. This request freezes only the current page-submitted fields.

202.description: Minimum bid submit command success body for Flutter App. The current frontend success chain freezes only `bidId`; this response must not expand into a full bid read projection, bid compare truth, shortlist or win-loss management, or order-create truth.

get.summary: Exhibition order detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum order detail read surface for Flutter App. This path freezes only the current `Order` read fields required by the Flutter App consumer and its embedded continuation milestones. The existing frozen `orderId` may be reused by the frontend only as a controlled local continuation context into the already existing canonical `contract/detail`, `rating/entry`, and `dispute/open` entries. This path must not expand into milestone list truth, inspection workflow truth, rating truth, dispute truth, contract truth, a `dispute/withdraw` carrier, or a second order continuation model.

post.summary: Create order from a submitted bid via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum order create command request for current Flutter App consumption. This request freezes only the current page-submitted field.

201.description: Minimum order create command success body for Flutter App. The current frontend success chain freezes only `orderId` and the first continuation milestone's `milestoneId`; this response must not expand into a full order read projection, milestone workflow truth, or a second order-success field model.

409.description: Controlled business error for order creation.

get.summary: Exhibition contract entry detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Contract workflow read projection for Flutter App. In the current Phase 3 planning boundary, this path exposes only the minimum contract workflow state and summary; clause editor design, sign workflow, legal review, history, and list remain unfrozen.

409.description: Controlled contract entry unavailable response. This path may not lazily create contract truth as canonical product semantics; if contract truth is absent, the server must return `CONTRACT_ENTRY_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Confirm contract entry via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum contract confirm request for the first Contract Phase 3 workflow handoff.

202.description: Contract confirm command accepted as the first workflow handoff. The current Phase 3 main loop still excludes signature flow, legal review, and history.

400.description: Controlled invalid contract-confirm request response. If `contractId` is missing or the minimum request body is malformed, the server must return `CONTRACT_CONFIRM_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled contract-confirm unavailable response. If the current contract truth is absent or the current contract state does not allow confirmation, the server must return `CONTRACT_ENTRY_UNAVAILABLE` or `CONTRACT_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Submit one minimum contract amendment handoff via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum contract amend request for the first Phase 3 contract workflow loop. This is a single-amendment handoff only; it is not a full clause editor.

202.description: Contract amend command accepted as the only new Phase 3 workflow handoff.

400.description: Controlled invalid contract-amend request response. If `contractId` or `amendmentSummary` is missing, the server must return `CONTRACT_AMEND_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled contract-amend unavailable response. If the current contract truth or workflow ceiling does not allow amendment, the server must return `CONTRACT_INVALID_STATE` or `CONTRACT_AMEND_LIMIT_REACHED`.

get.summary: Exhibition milestone list canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Minimum milestone list read surface for Flutter App. This path freezes only the current list carrier and milestone item fields required by the Flutter App consumer; it must not expand into inspection workflow truth, approval flow, evidence truth, or a second milestone continuation model.

post.summary: Exhibition milestone submit canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum milestone submit command request for current Flutter App consumption. This request freezes only the current page-submitted fields.

202.description: Minimum milestone submit command success body for Flutter App. The current frontend success chain freezes only `milestoneId`; this response must not expand into a full milestone read projection, inspection workflow truth, approval flow, or a second milestone success field model.

400.description: Controlled invalid milestone-submit request response. If the minimum request body is malformed or `milestoneId` is missing, the server must return `MILESTONE_SUBMIT_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled milestone-submit unavailable response. If the current milestone truth or current order-bound workflow state does not allow submission, the server must return `MILESTONE_INVALID_STATE`.

get.summary: Exhibition inspection entry detail canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Inspection detail projection for the approved minimum Phase 3 Inspection self-workflow. This read path is limited to the current server-returned inspection state and minimum summary; list, history, governance, and multi-round console capability remain unfrozen.

409.description: Controlled inspection entry unavailable response. This path may not lazily create inspection truth as canonical product semantics; if inspection truth is absent, the server must return `INSPECTION_ENTRY_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Submit inspection entry via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimal inspection submit request for the approved Phase 3 minimum Inspection closed-loop workflow. This path remains inside the minimum self-workflow boundary only and does not unlock list, history, governance, or multi-round console capability.

202.description: Inspection submit command accepted as the first command in the minimum Phase 3 Inspection workflow skeleton response. List, history, governance, and multi-round workflow expansion remain unfrozen.

400.description: Controlled invalid inspection-submit request response. If `inspectionId` is missing or the minimum request body is malformed, the server must return `INSPECTION_SUBMIT_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled inspection-submit unavailable response. If the current inspection truth is absent or the current inspection state does not allow submit, the server must return `INSPECTION_ENTRY_UNAVAILABLE` or `INSPECTION_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Submit inspection recheck via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimal inspection recheck request for the Phase 3 minimum closed-loop workflow. This path may be frozen before implementation, but it does not unlock implementation by itself. It remains outside the current first-release frontend happy-path bundle and requires a separately approved extension round to be exercised.

202.description: Inspection recheck command accepted as a minimum Phase 3 workflow skeleton response. Multi-round rectification and governance remain unfrozen. This response is not part of the current first-release frontend happy-path acceptance bundle.

409.description: Controlled business error for inspection recheck. If the current inspection state or Phase 3 workflow ceiling does not allow recheck, the server must return a controlled inspection error such as `INSPECTION_RECHECK_INVALID`, `INSPECTION_INVALID_STATE`, or `INSPECTION_RECHECK_LIMIT_REACHED`.

400.description: Controlled invalid inspection-recheck request response. If `inspectionId` is missing or the minimum request body is malformed, the server must return `INSPECTION_RECHECK_INVALID`.

get.summary: Exhibition rating entry canonical path for Flutter App

200.description: Rating entry aggregation for Flutter App. This path exposes the minimum workflow read projection only and prepares the controlled submit handoff for a persisted draft rating truth.

409.description: Controlled rating entry unavailable response. This path may not lazily create rating truth as canonical product semantics; before the current order first enters `completed`, or after `completed` while persisted rating truth still remains unavailable, the server must return `RATING_ENTRY_UNAVAILABLE`. Current first-release frontend acceptance may remain at this controlled unavailable boundary without requiring `rating/submit` success.

post.summary: Submit existing draft rating via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimal rating submit request for the next planned Rating round. Only `orderId` is frozen as the minimum request field. This path remains outside the current first-release frontend happy-path bundle and requires a separately approved extension round to be exercised.

202.description: Rating submit command accepted as the minimum action handoff. The server returns the minimum submitted projection only. This response is not part of the current first-release frontend happy-path acceptance bundle.

400.description: Controlled rating submit request error. If the minimum request body is invalid or `orderId` is missing, the server must return `RATING_SUBMIT_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled rating submit unavailable response. If the order is not `completed`, persisted rating truth is absent, or the current rating state is not `draft`, the server must return either `RATING_ENTRY_UNAVAILABLE` or `RATING_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Open dispute entry via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimal dispute open request for Phase 2.3 entry-state consumption.

202.description: Dispute open command accepted as an entry-state skeleton response. Full platform review and escalation flow remain unfrozen.

409.description: Controlled dispute-open unavailable response. If the current order state does not allow dispute opening, the server must return `DISPUTE_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Withdraw existing opened dispute via canonical path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimal dispute withdraw request for the next planned minimum governance action. Only disputeId is accepted at this layer. This path remains outside the current first-release frontend happy-path bundle.

202.description: Dispute withdraw command accepted as the minimum next-stage governance action response. Full review, escalation, and resolution workflow remain unfrozen. It remains outside the current first-release frontend happy-path acceptance bundle.

400.description: Controlled invalid withdraw request response. If disputeId is missing or the minimum request body is malformed, the server must return `DISPUTE_WITHDRAW_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled dispute-withdraw unavailable response. If dispute truth does not exist, the dispute is not opened, or the current actor is not the eligible opener side, the server must return `DISPUTE_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Submit fake-project report via canonical exhibition path for Flutter App

requestBody.description: Minimum fake-project report submit request for exhibition transaction governance only. This path is bounded to concrete target objects and does not reopen dispute detail, escalation, or appeal workflow.

200.description: Minimum fake-project report submit acknowledgment. Duplicate active reports may be accepted idempotently as `existing_active`.

400.description: Controlled invalid report-submit request response. If target object, reason code, or minimum input is invalid, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_INVALID`.

404.description: Controlled unavailable response. If the target object is hidden or does not exist for the current actor scope, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Initiate three-step upload via app-facing canonical path

requestBody.description: The upload init request must contain the frozen fields from upload_contracts.yaml only: businessType, businessId, fileKind, mimeType, size, checksum.

200.description: Upload strategy issued for step 1 of the three-step upload flow. Signed strategy structure remains a skeleton until transport fields are frozen.

post.summary: Confirm uploaded object and create file truth via app-facing canonical path

requestBody.description: Confirm request for step 3 of the upload flow. Only uploadSessionId is frozen for Phase 2A Flutter App consumption.

200.description: FileAsset confirmation skeleton. objectKey is storage location only and does not become business truth by itself.

post.summary: Project creation skeleton

202.description: Placeholder until contract freeze

post.summary: Bid submission skeleton

202.description: Placeholder until contract freeze

post.summary: Order activation skeleton

202.description: Placeholder until contract freeze

post.summary: Milestone submission skeleton

202.description: Placeholder until contract freeze

200.description: Minimum organization certification review list for Server Admin.

200.description: Minimum organization certification review detail for Server Admin.

200.description: Minimum organization review approve acknowledgment.

post.summary: Admin organization review reject canonical path

200.description: Minimum security-event list for Server Admin review only.

get.summary: Admin governance-penalty list canonical path

200.description: Minimum governance-penalty list for Server Admin only.

post.summary: Admin governance-penalty apply canonical path

200.description: Minimum governance-penalty apply acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid penalty-apply response. If the request body is malformed or missing minimum fields, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_PENALTY_APPLY_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If the current governance subject state does not allow this penalty action, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_INVALID_STATE`.

get.summary: Admin governance-penalty detail canonical path

200.description: Minimum governance-penalty detail for Server Admin only.

404.description: Controlled unavailable response. If the targeted penalty truth is not available under the current admin scope, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_PENALTY_RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`.

get.summary: Admin governance-appeal list canonical path

200.description: Minimum governance-appeal list for Server Admin only.

get.summary: Admin governance-appeal detail canonical path

200.description: Minimum governance-appeal detail for Server Admin only.

404.description: Controlled unavailable response. If the targeted appeal truth is not available under the current admin scope, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_APPEAL_RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Admin governance-appeal decide canonical path

200.description: Minimum governance-appeal decide acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid appeal-decision response. If the request body is malformed or missing minimum fields, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_APPEAL_DECIDE_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If the current appeal case may not be decided in the current state, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Admin whitelist-membership grant canonical path

200.description: Minimum whitelist-grant acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid whitelist-grant response. If the request body is malformed or missing minimum fields, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_WHITELIST_GRANT_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If whitelist grant is not allowed in the current governance state, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Admin whitelist-membership revoke canonical path

200.description: Minimum whitelist-revoke acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid whitelist-revoke response. If the request body is malformed or the targeted whitelist membership is invalid, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_WHITELIST_REVOKE_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If whitelist revoke is not allowed in the current governance state, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Admin permanent-ban apply canonical path

200.description: Minimum permanent-ban apply acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid permanent-ban apply response. If the request body is malformed or missing minimum fields, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_PERMANENT_BAN_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If permanent ban is not allowed in the current governance state, the server must return `GOVERNANCE_INVALID_STATE`.

get.summary: Admin exhibition report-case queue canonical path

200.description: Minimum exhibition report-case queue for Server Admin only.

get.summary: Admin exhibition report-case detail canonical path

200.description: Minimum exhibition report-case detail for Server Admin only.

404.description: Controlled unavailable response. If the report case is hidden or does not exist for the current admin scope, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`.

post.summary: Admin request explanation for exhibition report-case

200.description: Minimum explanation-request acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid request response. If the body is malformed, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_REQUEST_EXPLANATION_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If the case may not request explanation in the current state, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Admin decide exhibition report-case

200.description: Minimum adjudication-decision acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid decision request response. If the body is malformed, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_DECIDE_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If the case may not be decided in the current state, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_INVALID_STATE`.

post.summary: Admin escalate exhibition report-case into governance ticket

200.description: Minimum report-case escalation acknowledgment.

400.description: Controlled invalid escalation request response. If the body is malformed, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_ESCALATE_INVALID`.

409.description: Controlled invalid-state response. If the case may not escalate in the current state, the server must return `REVIEW_REPORT_INVALID_STATE`.

get.summary: Admin enterprise hub application list canonical path

200.description: Enterprise hub application list for controlled admin review only.

get.summary: Admin enterprise hub application detail canonical path

200.description: Enterprise hub application detail for controlled admin review only.

post.summary: Admin review enterprise hub application canonical path

200.description: Enterprise hub application review decision accepted.

post.summary: Publish enterprise hub listing canonical path for admin

200.description: Enterprise hub listing published.

post.summary: Offline enterprise hub listing canonical path for admin

200.description: Enterprise hub listing offlined.

post.summary: Freeze enterprise hub listing canonical path for admin

200.description: Enterprise hub listing frozen.

get.summary: Admin enterprise hub recommendation slot list canonical path

200.description: Enterprise hub recommendation slot list for admin only.

post.summary: Configure enterprise hub recommendation slot canonical path for admin

200.description: Enterprise hub recommendation slot configured.

AppVisibleBuilding.description: Controlled shell-visible building code only. This field is a shell projection, not a second navigation tree or local route contract.

AppShellUnreadSummary.description: Controlled unread bucket summary only. This object is not a message center truth surface, delivery-state ledger, or notification orchestration model.

organizationId.description: Nullable when the current actor has no organization scope.

ProfileOrganizationSummary.description: Minimum read-only organization projection for the profile building only.

organizationId.description: Nullable when the current actor has no organization scope.

ProfileSettingsEntry.description: Controlled settings entry visibility only. This is not a full settings subsystem contract.

ForumCursorPageInfo.description: Frozen cursor page carrier for forum list-like paths only. This is a transport paging projection and not forum ranking, indexing, or moderation truth.

ForumFeedScope.description: Current frozen first-level forum feed scopes only.

ForumAuthorSummary.description: Minimum forum author summary only. This object is not profile truth, organization management truth, or a second identity contract.

ForumAttachmentRef.description: Confirmed file truth reference only for forum read models. `objectKey` must stay outside the app-facing forum business contract.

ForumEngagementSummary.description: Minimum forum engagement projection only. This is not ranking truth or operator analytics truth.

ForumTopicState.description: Current minimum topic state set consumed by the Flutter App forum surfaces.

ForumPostState.description: Current minimum post state set consumed by the Flutter App forum surfaces.

ForumDraftState.description: Current minimum draft state set consumed by the Flutter App forum draft surfaces.

ForumDraftType.description: Current minimum draft-kind set consumed by the Flutter App forum draft surfaces.

ForumCommentState.description: Current minimum comment state set consumed by the Flutter App forum surfaces.

ForumInteractionInboxTab.description: Current minimum interaction-inbox tabs for the messages building.

ForumInteractionTargetType.description: Current minimum source-object kinds carried by forum-originated interaction inbox items.

ForumTopicCard.description: Shared minimum topic-card projection for `forum/feed`, `forum/topic/list`, and the recent-topic carrier inside `forum/me/index`.

ForumTopicMetadataItem.description: Minimum topic metadata item for publish-time classification and internal filter selection only.

ForumFeedItem.description: Minimum post-centric feed item for the current forum browse chain.

ForumPostCard.description: Minimum forum post-card projection for search results and the me-subtree recent-post carrier only.

ForumDraftCard.description: Minimum forum draft-card projection for `forum/draft/list` and the me-subtree recent-draft carrier only.

ForumTopicDetailReadModel.description: Minimum forum topic detail read projection only. This model freezes topic summary and lead-post anchors without reopening reply timeline truth or moderation truth.

ForumPostDetailReadModel.description: Minimum forum post detail read projection only. This model freezes one post body plus confirmed attachment references and must not become edit truth or moderation truth.

ForumCommentItem.description: Minimum forum comment item for post comment-chain reads only.

ForumCommentAssetItem.description: Minimum my-comment asset projection for the profile forum assets surface.

ForumPublishRequest.description: Minimum forum publish handoff request only. Upload signing remains on the shared file-upload path family; forum publish forwards only an existing Server-owned `draftId`.

ForumPublishSummary.description: Controlled forum publish summary skeleton only.

ForumPublishAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum forum publish command success body only. This response carries the published anchors required by the current Flutter App continuation and must not expand into forum detail truth.

ForumDraftSaveRequest.description: Current minimum post-draft save request only. Attachment references must use confirmed `FileAsset` ids only.

ForumFeedResponse.description: Minimum forum feed carrier for Flutter App.

ForumTopicMetadataResponse.description: Minimum forum topic-metadata carrier for classify, select, and filter only.

ForumTopicListResponse.description: Minimum forum topic-list carrier for Flutter App.

ForumDraftListResponse.description: Minimum forum draft-list carrier for Flutter App.

ForumCommentListResponse.description: Minimum forum post-comment chain carrier for Flutter App.

ForumSearchResultType.description: Current minimum result-kind set for forum search.

ForumSearchResultItem.description: Minimum forum search result card only. This is not search-index truth and does not expose moderation annotations.

ForumSearchResponse.description: Minimum forum search carrier for Flutter App.

ForumMeSummary.description: Minimum me-subtree summary counts for forum aggregation only.

ForumMeIndexResponse.description: Minimum forum me-subtree summary projection for Flutter App.

ForumInteractionInboxItem.description: Minimum forum-originated interaction inbox item for the messages building only.

ProjectCreateRequest.description: Minimum project create command request only. The optional `description` field may be omitted and must remain optional in the current frozen boundary.

ProjectCreateAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum project create command success body only. This response carries just the created `projectId` needed by the current Flutter App success continuation and must not be expanded into a full project read model.

BidSubmitRequest.description: Minimum bid submit command request only. This request is frozen to the current Flutter App page-submitted fields and must not be expanded into bid comparison, shortlist, or award-management truth.

BidSubmitAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum bid submit command success body only. This response carries just the created `bidId` needed by the current Flutter App success continuation and must not be expanded into a full bid read model or order truth.

OrderCreateRequest.description: Minimum order create command request only. This request is frozen to the current Flutter App handoff field and must not be expanded into order acceptance, fulfillment state machine, or milestone-submit truth.

OrderCreateAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum order create command success body only. This response carries the created `orderId` and, when present, only the first continuation milestone's `milestoneId` needed by the current Flutter App success continuation.

milestones.description: Controlled continuation carrier only. In the current frozen boundary, frontend may consume only the first item's `milestoneId`; additional milestone fields and broader milestone list semantics are not frozen here.

OrderCreateContinuationMilestoneRef.description: Minimum continuation milestone reference only. This is not the milestone workflow truth and must not be expanded into full milestone list or submission semantics.

MilestoneSubmitRequest.description: Minimum milestone submit command request only. This request is frozen to the current Flutter App page-submitted fields; `submissionNote` remains optional in the current boundary.

MilestoneSubmitAcceptedResponse.description: Minimum milestone submit command success body only. This response carries just the current `milestoneId` needed by the Flutter App continuation and must not be expanded into inspection, approval, or milestone-read truth.

OrderDetailState.description: Current minimum order state set consumed by the Flutter App `order/detail` route.

OrderDetailSummary.description: Controlled order summary carrier only for `order/detail`. No internal summary fields are frozen in the current boundary.

OrderDetailMilestoneState.description: Current shared minimum milestone state set consumed by `milestone/list` and the embedded milestone continuation items inside `order/detail`.

OrderDetailMilestoneSummary.description: Controlled shared milestone summary carrier only for `milestone/list` and the embedded milestone continuation items inside `order/detail`. No internal summary fields are frozen in the current boundary.

OrderDetailMilestoneLink.description: Current shared minimum milestone item consumed by `GET /api/app/milestone/list` and by the embedded continuation items in `GET /api/app/order/detail`.

MilestoneListResponse.description: Minimum list carrier for the current Flutter App milestone list consumer. No top-level `summary`, `orderId`, or other list carrier fields are frozen in the current boundary.

OrderDetailReadModel.description: Minimum `Order` read projection for the current Flutter App `order/detail` consumer. This model freezes only the fields currently required by the frontend consumer layer and current page continuation. The already frozen `orderId` may be reused only as controlled local continuation context into existing canonical `contract/detail`, `rating/entry`, and `dispute/open` entries; no new continuation field or second continuation model is frozen here.

milestones.description: Embedded continuation milestones only for `order/detail`. This does not freeze the standalone `milestone/list` route.

ProjectState.description: Current minimum project state set consumed by the Flutter App exhibition building.

ProjectReadSummary.description: Controlled project summary skeleton only. This is the same minimum summary carrier shared by `project/list` items and `project/detail`.

ProjectReadModel.description: Shared minimum `Project` read projection for the current Flutter App `project/list` and `project/detail` consumers. These two paths must not diverge into separate project field semantics in the current frozen boundary.

ProjectListResponse.description: Minimum list carrier for the current Flutter App project pool.

ExhibitionWorkbenchSummaryResponse.description: Controlled exhibition private workbench summary only. This response freezes one workbench summary projection and must not become a second owner for `Project`, `Order`, `Contract`, `Milestone`, `Inspection`, `Rating`, or `Dispute` truth.

WorkbenchProjectChain.description: Controlled workbench summary container for the current project chain only. Allowed workbench actions are `create project` and `open project pool` only. This container must hide direct bid-submit, publish, award, collaboration, and any second project dashboard behavior.

recentProjectId.description: Current recent project context only. This is not a second project detail truth.

WorkbenchOrderChain.description: Controlled workbench summary container for the current order chain only. Allowed workbench actions are `open order detail`, `open contract detail`, and `open dispute open` only. This container must hide `rating/submit`, `dispute/withdraw`, contract history/list, and any second order workflow.

activeOrderId.description: Current continuable order instance carrier only for workbench summary use.

activeOrderState.description: Projected current order truth state only. No second order state machine is frozen here.

WorkbenchFulfillmentChain.description: Controlled workbench summary container for the current fulfillment chain only. Allowed workbench actions are `open milestone list`, `open milestone submit`, `open inspection detail`, and `open inspection submit` only. This container must hide `inspection/recheck`, inspection history/list, governance queue, and multi-round workflow consoles.

activeMilestoneId.description: Current continuable fulfillment instance carrier only for workbench summary use.

inspectionState.description: Projected current inspection truth state only. This is not a second inspection workflow model.

WorkbenchRatingEntryState.description: Controlled workbench boundary-state only for rating entry. This state does not make `rating/submit` part of the current workbench executable action set.

WorkbenchExtensionBoundary.description: Controlled workbench boundary container only. It reuses the current `order_chain.activeOrderId` context and must not freeze a second extension carrier. Allowed workbench actions are `open contract detail` and `open dispute open` only. It must keep rating as a boundary-state only and must freeze `dispute/withdraw`.

HomeLocationPermissionState.description: Client-reported device location permission state for current request hints only.

HomeLocationSource.description: Effective location source priority for the current ordered home only.

HomeSelectionScope.description: Effective location-selection scope for the current ordered home only.

ExhibitionHomeLocationContext.description: Current request location hint only. This object does not create persisted location truth.

ExhibitionHomeLocation.description: Normalized current exhibition home location carrier only.

ExhibitionHomeResponse.description: Normalized ordered exhibition home read model only. This response may aggregate current location and weather data, but it must not create persisted weather truth, persisted location truth, or a second home workflow state machine. The current weather block may include a V1 construction weather warning semantic layer shaped by `BFF` fixed rules only.

constructionRiskLevel.description: Current construction-risk level derived by `BFF` fixed-rule evaluation only.

constructionRiskSummary.description: User-facing fixed-template summary for today's construction risk.

riskTags.description: Active fixed-rule tags only. Current canonical values are: `rain`, `night_rain`, `high_temp`, `low_temp`, `strong_wind`, `lightning`, and `official_alert`.

riskTimeLabel.description: Current highest-priority construction-risk time label only. May be `null` when stable timing is unavailable.

nightRainExpected.description: Explicit current-night rain expectation for construction planning.

nightRainTimeLabel.description: Current-night rain time label only. May be `null` when stable timing is unavailable.

officialAlerts.description: Controlled user-facing official-alert strings only. This array may be empty.

constructionSuggestions.description: Fixed-template construction suggestions only. This field must not contain `LLM`-generated free text.

sourceLabel.description: User-facing controlled source label only. Provider-native labels remain hidden.

selectionNotice.description: Explicit current-round location persistence notice for direct frontend display.

ExhibitionHomeRefreshRequest.description: Optional current request refresh context only. Refresh still targets the current full-home projection, not a weather-only block.

ExhibitionHomeLocationSelectRequest.description: Manual current-location selection request for the ordered exhibition home only.

EnterpriseHubBoardProfile.description: Board-specific detail profile only. The selected shape must match the current enterprise primary board type.

EnterpriseHubCreateApplicationRequest.description: Create one enterprise hub application draft under the current authenticated organization scope only.

InstanceTodoRouteTarget.description: Controlled registered-entry projection only. This is not a local route name, not a second app-facing path, and not a complete `RegisteredInstanceEntryItem` exposure surface. The old `routeTarget.routeName` target contract has exited the formal schema.

localEntryKey.description: Consumer-local stable key only; not a route path.

requiredParams.description: Frozen minimum parameter shape for the selected registered entry.

state.description: Minimum registered-entry enablement state only. This state belongs to the projected entry target, not to the `instance_todo` item.

routeParams.description: Concrete parameter values bound to the frozen `requiredParams` shape.

state.description: Minimum `instance_todo` pending state only. This state belongs to the todo carrier item and must not be mixed with `routeTarget.state`, which belongs to the registered entry projection.

entryKey.description: Stable registration-row key for the unified instance entry registry.

canonicalPath.description: App-facing canonical entry reference only; not frontend routing detail.

consumerBuilding.description: Existing consumer building for the first pre-embed registration batch.

localEntryKey.description: Consumer-local stable key only; not a canonical path or route path.
